scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'ua="${npm_config_user_agent:-}"; if [ -z "$ua" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$ua" in npm/*|bun/*) ;; *) echo "Use npm or bun instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run --workspaces --if-present build
scripts.build:replit-artifact: npm run -w @workspace/chat-ui build && npm run -w @workspace/api-server build
scripts.artifact:api-server: npm run build:replit-artifact && npm run -w @workspace/api-server dev:serve
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run --workspaces --if-present typecheck
